stories.description: Cloud SQL Socket Support & Deployment Commands (STORY-001)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: `cd server && npx vitest run __tests__/unit/db-connection.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 3 passing tests with zero failures
server/db.ts supports Cloud SQL socket — `grep -c "socketPath" server/db.ts` returns at least 1
staging-rehearsal.ts supports Cloud SQL socket — `grep -c "socketPath" server/scripts/staging-rehearsal.ts` returns at least 1
DB_SOCKET_PATH is the socket env var (not DB_HOST overloading) — `grep -c "DB_SOCKET_PATH" server/db.ts` returns at least 1
DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS.md exists — `test -f docs/deployment/DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS.md covers all 9 deployment phases — `grep -c "^## Phase\|^## Step\|^### Phase\|^### Step" docs/deployment/DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS.md` returns at least 9
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-001 — `grep -c "STORY-001" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1
Provisioning script exists — `test -f scripts/provision-gcp.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Script targets correct GCP project — `grep -c "gen-lang-client-0535844903" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 3
Script enables all 5 required APIs — `grep -c "services enable" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 5
Script uses Artifact Registry (not deprecated GCR) — `grep -c "artifacts repositories\|artifactregistry" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 1
Script creates Cloud SQL instance — `grep -c "sql instances create" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 1
Script creates only real secrets in Secret Manager (DB_PASSWORD, GEMINI_API_KEY) — `grep -c "secrets create" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 2
Script creates dedicated service account — `grep -c "loadpilot-api-sa\|iam service-accounts create" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 1
Script grants secretAccessor role to service account — `grep -c "secretmanager.secretAccessor\|secretAccessor" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 1
Script grants cloudsql.client role to service account — `grep -c "cloudsql.client" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 1
Script documents db-f1-micro as staging-only — `grep -c "staging.only\|shared.core\|not.production\|staging only\|shared core\|no SLA" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 1
.env.staging exists — `test -f .env.staging && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
.env.staging sets VITE_API_URL=/api (not empty, not localhost) — `grep -c "VITE_API_URL=/api" .env.staging` returns at least 1
.env.staging is gitignored — `grep -c ".env.staging" .gitignore` returns at least 1
Script grants serviceAccountUser on dedicated SA to deployer — `grep -c "serviceAccountUser\|iam.serviceAccountUser" scripts/provision-gcp.sh` returns at least 1
Syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/provision-gcp-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 9 passing tests
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-002 — `grep -c "STORY-002" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1
deploy-staging.sh exists — `test -f scripts/deploy-staging.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
run-staging-migrations.sh exists — `test -f scripts/run-staging-migrations.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
verify-staging.sh exists — `test -f scripts/verify-staging.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Deploy script uses Artifact Registry — `grep -c "docker.pkg.dev" scripts/deploy-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script targets loadpilot-api Cloud Run service — `grep -c "loadpilot-api" scripts/deploy-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script sets NODE_ENV=staging — `grep -c "NODE_ENV=staging" scripts/deploy-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script uses min-instances=0 for staging cost savings — `grep -c "min-instances=0\|min-instances 0" scripts/deploy-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script uses dedicated service account — `grep -c "service-account" scripts/deploy-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script sets DB_SOCKET_PATH for Cloud Run — `grep -c "DB_SOCKET_PATH" scripts/deploy-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Deploy script builds frontend with VITE_API_URL=/api — `grep -c "VITE_API_URL\|env.staging" scripts/deploy-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Migration script uses Cloud SQL Auth Proxy in TCP mode — `grep -c "cloud-sql-proxy\|cloud_sql_proxy" scripts/run-staging-migrations.sh` returns at least 1
Migration script uses port 3307 for proxy — `grep -c "3307" scripts/run-staging-migrations.sh` returns at least 1
Verification script checks health endpoint — `grep -c "/api/health" scripts/verify-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Verification script explicitly rejects 500 as auth success — `grep -c "500" scripts/verify-staging.sh` returns at least 1 (must be in rejection logic, not acceptance)
Verification script checks for localhost in built frontend — `grep -c "localhost" scripts/verify-staging.sh` returns at least 1
Syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/deploy-staging-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 10 passing tests
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-003 — `grep -c "STORY-003" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1
rollback-drill.sh exists — `test -f scripts/rollback-drill.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
setup-monitoring.sh exists — `test -f scripts/setup-monitoring.sh && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Rollback script uses traffic update command — `grep -c "update-traffic" scripts/rollback-drill.sh` returns at least 1
Rollback script checks health before and after — `grep -c "/api/health" scripts/rollback-drill.sh` returns at least 2
Monitoring script uses stable CLI for policies (not alpha) — `grep -c "gcloud alpha" scripts/setup-monitoring.sh` returns 0
Monitoring script uses --policy-from-file — `grep -c "policy-from-file" scripts/setup-monitoring.sh` returns at least 1
Monitoring script sets error rate threshold — `grep -c "error" scripts/setup-monitoring.sh` returns at least 1
Monitoring script uses gcloud beta for notification channels — `grep -c "gcloud beta monitoring channels create\|gcloud beta monitoring channels" scripts/setup-monitoring.sh` returns at least 1
Syntax tests pass — `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/rollback-drill-syntax.test.ts --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 8 passing tests
Go/No-Go checklist references deployment scripts — `grep -c "scripts/" docs/deployment/GO_NO_GO_CHECKLIST.md` returns at least 3
Rollback drill evidence has staging template — `grep -c "Phase 2\|Staging" docs/deployment/ROLLBACK_DRILL_EVIDENCE.md` returns at least 1
All existing server tests pass — `cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` shows zero failures
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-004 — `grep -c "STORY-004" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1
`cd server && npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs passing tests with zero failures
`npx vitest run --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs passing tests with zero failures
`npx playwright test --reporter=list 2>&1 | grep "passed"` outputs at least 186 passing tests with zero failures

STAGING_SETUP.md references automated scripts — `grep -c "scripts/provision-gcp\|scripts/deploy-staging\|scripts/run-staging-migrations\|scripts/verify-staging" docs/deployment/STAGING_SETUP.md` returns at least 4
GO_NO_GO_CHECKLIST.md has operator execution guide — `grep -c "Operator Execution\|execution guide\|Script Command" docs/deployment/GO_NO_GO_CHECKLIST.md` returns at least 1
DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md references Artifact Registry — `grep -c "docker.pkg.dev\|Artifact Registry" docs/deployment/DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md` returns at least 1
DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md references dedicated service account — `grep -c "service-account\|loadpilot-api-sa" docs/deployment/DEPLOYMENT_RUNBOOK.md` returns at least 1
STAGING_SETUP.md documents DB_SOCKET_PATH (not DB_HOST overloading) — `grep -c "DB_SOCKET_PATH" docs/deployment/STAGING_SETUP.md` returns at least 1

Docker image builds — `docker build -t loadpilot-api:regression-test . 2>&1 | grep -c "successfully\|exporting to image\|naming to"` returns at least 1. If Docker unavailable, document skip in verification log with `"docker_available": false`

All 6 deployment scripts exist — `ls scripts/provision-gcp.sh scripts/deploy-staging.sh scripts/run-staging-migrations.sh scripts/verify-staging.sh scripts/rollback-drill.sh scripts/setup-monitoring.sh 2>/dev/null | wc -l` returns 6
Staging frontend sanity — verify-staging.sh includes localhost check — `grep -c "localhost" scripts/verify-staging.sh` returns at least 1 (confirms STORY-003 R-P3-15 persists)
Verification log contains PASS entry for STORY-005 — `grep -c "STORY-005" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 1
Verification log completeness — stories 1-5 logged — `grep -c "STORY-00[1-5]" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 5
`provision-gcp.sh` executed successfully — `gcloud artifacts repositories describe loadpilot --location=us-central1 --format='value(name)'` returns the repo name
Cloud SQL instance exists — `gcloud sql instances describe loadpilot-staging --format='value(state)'` returns `RUNNABLE`

Dedicated service account exists with correct roles — `gcloud iam service-accounts describe loadpilot-api-sa@gen-lang-client-0535844903.iam.gserviceaccount.com --format='value(email)'` returns the SA email
Secrets exist and SA can access them — `gcloud secrets describe DB_PASSWORD --format='value(name)'` returns the secret name
`deploy-staging.sh` executed successfully — Cloud Run service URL returns 200 on `/api/health`
Firebase Hosting URL returns 200 on `/api/health` through the rewrite
`run-staging-migrations.sh` executed successfully — migration report shows `overallPassed: true`
`verify-staging.sh` executed successfully — protected endpoints return 401 or 403 (NOT 500)
`rollback-drill.sh` executed successfully — evidence documented with revision names and timestamps
`setup-monitoring.sh` executed successfully — monitoring policies and notification channel created
Evidence document exists — `test -f docs/deployment/STAGING_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE.md && echo "exists"` returns "exists"
Evidence document contains Cloud Run URL — `grep -c "run.app" docs/deployment/STAGING_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE.md` returns at least 1
Evidence document contains migration report — `grep -c "overallPassed\|migration" docs/deployment/STAGING_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE.md` returns at least 1
Go/No-Go checklist items 2-8 completed with actual values — `grep -c "GREEN\|PASS\|✓\|CHECKED" docs/deployment/GO_NO_GO_CHECKLIST.md` returns at least 6

Verification log completeness — all 6 stories logged — `grep -c "STORY-00[1-6]" .claude/docs/verification-log.jsonl` returns at least 6
